channel.title: Reliability on ivomarino.com
channel.description: Recent content in Reliability on ivomarino.com

item.title: Out-of-Band SSH Tunnel Failover: Why Stability Beats Speed
item.description: Building reliable automatic gateway failover for critical infrastructure recovery access. How naive health checks broke everything, and why a 30-second stable recovery is better than a 5-second flapping failover.

item.title: ZFS + NFS as Kubernetes Storage: Point-in-Time Recovery Without the Cost
item.description: Kubernetes storage is either ephemeral or expensive. We run a FreeBSD VM with ZFS + NFS in the same VPC as our K8s cluster. Hourly snapshots protect your data. Fast recovery. No vendor lock-in. Here’s how we do it.
